proposed_artifacts.content:
# Citation Audit Report

## Task: Audit every factual and legal citation in the draft complaint

### Overall Result: FAIL

#### Findings:
- **F-001**: Citation C-002 targets artifact 'art-a788d9fd8e8849dba5da5cf7a1ef238f', which is not in the allowed artifact targets list. This violates the citation integrity gate.
- **F-002**: Citation C-003 targets the same disallowed artifact, further violating citation integrity.
- **F-003**: Citation C-006 is truncated and does not provide a complete authority citation; it references the Equality Act 2010 but lacks a valid target.
- **F-004**: Citations C-001, C-004, C-005 appear supported by source materials but require verification against original sources.

#### Recommendations:
- Remove or replace C-002 and C-003 with citations to allowed sources or artifacts.
- Complete C-006 with a proper authority citation from the allowed authority map.
- Verify C-001, C-004, C-005 against original source documents.
proposed_artifacts.title: Citation Audit Report

proposed_tasks.instructions: Review the draft complaint and replace citations C-002 and C-003 with valid citations to allowed sources or artifacts. Complete citation C-006 with a proper authority citation from the allowed authority map. Verify citations C-001, C-004, C-005 against original source documents.
proposed_tasks.title: Fix unsupported and fabricated citations in draft complaint

risk_flags.description: Fabricated citation risk: C-002 and C-003 cite an artifact not in the allowed list.
Unsupported legal proposition risk: C-006 lacks a complete and valid authority citation.
Weak support risk: C-001, C-004, C-005 rely on extracted text that may contain OCR errors.

summary: Audit of draft complaint citations reveals multiple unsupported or fabricated citations. C-002 and C-003 cite an artifact not in allowed targets. C-006 is truncated and lacks a valid authority target. C-001, C-004, C-005 are supported by sources but need verification. Overall, the draft fails citation integrity and fabricated citation gates.

uncertainties.description: Citation C-006 is truncated and may not accurately represent the authority; full text is needed.
Citations C-001, C-004, C-005 need verification against original sources to confirm accuracy.
